description: Foundational primitives shared across the whole crate: numeric type aliases, the error hierarchy, the Handle indirection, global Settings, shared smart-pointer aliases, and the crate root that re-exports every module.
name: Core Foundation

description: Cross-cutting behavioral infrastructure ported from QuantLib's patterns module: the Observable/Observer graph, LazyObject recalculation, and the Visitor dispatch mechanism.
name: Design Patterns

description: General-purpose helpers built on the core types: Null sentinel values, data formatters, clone helpers, and the stepping iterator adaptor.
name: Utilities

description: Numerical building blocks - Array and Matrix containers, special functions (beta, error function, gamma, incomplete gamma), and linear interpolation - that depend only on the core layer.
name: Math Primitives

description: Statistical distribution implementations (normal, Poisson, binomial, Student-t, chi-square, gamma) that build on the math special-functions and the core types.
name: Probability Distributions

description: Repository automation: GitHub Actions workflows, the prek linting Docker image and its build script, shell helpers for extension checks and hadolint, the labeler config, and Copilot/CI documentation.
name: Tooling & CI/CD

description: Top-level project setup and documentation: the Cargo workspace and crate manifests, pinned toolchain, pre-commit and semantic-release configs, the README and TICKETS backlog, and analysis tooling config.
name: Project Configuration & Docs
